versions.version_description: Includes chords and synth melodies arranged for guitar.
This Tab Is A Simplified Version Of The Song. There Honestly Isn't Much To The Song, Chord-wise, So... Yeah.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Main Riff]
[ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Ab/F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb5[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]                [ch]Cm[/ch]
I’ve been tryna call[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
I’ve been on my own for long enough[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Maybe you can show me how to love[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm[/ch]
Maybe[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Cm[/ch]
I’m going through withdrawals[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
You don’t even have to do too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
You can turn me on with just a touch[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
Baby[/tab]

I look around and

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Sin City’s cold and empty[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
No one’s around to judge me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
I can’t see clearly when you’re[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Go-o   -   one[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Ab/F[/ch]
I said, ooh, I’m blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]Bb5[/ch]
No, I can’t sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Ab/F[/ch]
I said, ooh, I’m drowning in the night,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                                      [ch]Bb5[/ch]
Oh, when I’m like this, you’re the one I trust[/tab]

Hey Hey Hey

[Main Riff]
[ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Ab/F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb5[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                   [ch]Cm[/ch]
I’m running out of time[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
‘Cuz I can see the sun light up the sky[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]
So I hit the road in overdrive[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, oh  oh[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
No one’s around to judge me[/tab]

I can’t see clearly when you’re[/tab]

I said, ooh, I’m blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]Bb5[/ch]
No, I can’t sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Ab/F[/ch]
